response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and identified three distinct scenes based on audio and visual changes (dialogue-music-dialogue). 2. Identified the vocal music performance (00:10.500-02:56.000). 3. Used on-screen text to identify the song as 'Daidai Dai Dai Daikirai' by 'Amala'. 4. Performed web searches for lyrics and translation, confirmed song metadata. 5. Mapped scenes, metadata, and lyrics into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue intro, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Daidai Dai Dai Daikirai' by Amala, performed by Kiara and Anya, and concluded with a dialogue scene.

scenes.description: Dialogue scene where the characters Kiara and Anya discuss singing.
Kiara and Anya perform the song 'Daidai Dai Dai Daikirai'. On-screen text indicates 'Lyrics, Music: Amala'.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
All, all, it's all your fault.
It makes me want to throw up, it's so annoying.
Clinging to something, flattering someone,
I was a fool to have expectations.
An eight-way beauty that serves to please,
That's why you'll get a lifelong anti, gimme.
Shallow capacity, thanks as always,
In the end, your life is always plain.
'Hatable!' 'Painful!'
Not being able to ignore it makes it even more
Frustrating, irritating,
I'm sick of your self-praise.
(Look around!!)
The opposite of like is apathy
= proof of being connected.
An inseparable relationship,
I want to break free.
This is what you call hate speech,
I'm putting anonymous statements into life.
Unending siren, cramping every time it approaches,
I'm always obedient to the red light.
Basically, how I see you,
I hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you!
OMG, how pathetic, already,
Bye-bye, bye-bye, I want to say bye.
My brain is also unpredictable, so
There's no, no, no, no, no solution.
How about it? How do you see me?
Have you come to hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me?
Ah, a hundred harms and no benefit, nothing not see,
Even if you line up the ifs, it's just nicotine.
The result of approaching with 'I miss you' is a clumsy mistake, a clumsy mistake,
Thank you, counter-teacher,
This aftertaste will never disappear in my lifetime.
Good, good, good boy,
Smiling, scattering smiles, what a good boy.
But, but, what's your true nature?
Can't you even distinguish good from evil? (Lol), huh.
Wrapped up in an environment that surrounds you with a point-deduction system,
In your lifetime, no one will even hear you cry 'Painful! Painful! Painful!'
I got hit by the natural retribution,
People are mirrors,
In reality, dependency is two-sided,
Even if you shut down, it clings to you,
My own weakness is shameful.
All, all, it's all your fault,
It doesn't stop to the point of throwing up.
If only I could just cut it off, it would be easier.
Basically, how I see you,
I hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you, hate you!
OMG, how pathetic, already,
Bye-bye, bye-bye, I want to say bye.

There's no, no, no, no, no solution.

Have you come to hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me, hate me?
Ah, a hundred harms and no benefit, nothing not see,
Even if you line up the ifs, it's just nicotine.
The result of approaching with 'I miss you' is a clumsy mistake, a clumsy mistake,
